title: ctenitis erinacea
intro: Ctenitis erinacea, also known as Erinacea fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis erinacea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
